channel.title: BWWL Hampionship League
channel.description: Recent content on BWWL Hampionship League

item.title: Draft Rankings
item.description: Draft Recap All will say they survived, but some will never be the same… After a frantic delay and shots of PROPA TWELVE, we managed to begin the draft after a mere 30 minute delay. I believe it was about the second round when I began raving that I was “so drunk” and that this draft would be a disaster. I remember going to Kevin several times and lamenting about how I chose D’Andre Swift over CeeDee Lamb, only to find out hours later CeeDee had been taken two rounds earlier.

item.title: Rankings
item.description: Current Power Rankings Team Owner Record Ranking Alpha Chad Squad of Studs Steb 0-0 1 Gimme Da Cheeks PJ 0-0 1 Summer Camp Elites Conor 0-0 1 Audit the Scores Sean C 0-0 1 Set the Earth Reveberating Garrett 0-0 1 Newport Shorts Paul 0-0 1 bAsEd AnD rIdLeY PiLlEd Kebin 0-0 1 Stop He's Already Dead Luke 0-0 1 Chubby Chasers Walhuf 0-0 1 Super Weenie Hut Jr's Sean Brady 0-0 1
